title: Data for Falgenhauer, et al., "Transcriptional interference in toehold switch-based RNA circuits"
author: Simmel, Friedrich C.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Contains DNA sequences of the gene specific primers for RT-qPCR, the RT-qPCR raw data and output files used in "Transcriptional interference in toehold switch-based RNA circuits" by Falgenhauer et al.
steps_raw: Contains DNA sequences of the gene specific primers for RT-qPCR, the RT-qPCR raw data and output files used in "Transcriptional interference in toehold switch-based RNA circuits" by Falgenhauer et al.
